nasb.text: and they sent the varicolored tunic and brought it to their father and said, “We found this; please examine it to see whether it is your son’s tunic or not.”

esv.text: And they sent the robe of many colors and brought it to their father and said, “This we have found; please identify whether it is your son’s robe or not.”

cnv.text: 然後打發人把彩衣送到他們父親那裡，說：“這是我們找到的。請你認一認，是你兒子的長衣不是？”

ccb.text: 拿去给父亲，说：“我们捡到这件衣服，你看看是不是你儿子的？”

csbs.text: 然后派人把彩色的袍子带到他们父亲那里，说：“我们找到了这个，请你认一认，是不是你儿子的袍子？”
